title: Kira: Death Note
description: This mod adds the Death Note into your world.
body:
![Kira Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/227a78d9c92bd9d808a7cd2a178852fd018a7003.png)

# Current Features:
- **Randomized Player Names**
  A list of numerous First and Last names that sets you with a custom name that Kira must find in order to kill you.
- **Death Note Item**
  Type in a person's Name to give them a heart attack. 1/500 chance of spawning in survival, only three remain in the world naturally.
- **Identification Card Item **
  Sets your Name to it, serves as a way to authenticate who you are.
        Forged Variant, right click to generate a random fake name (WIP).
- **Shinigami Eyes (WIP)**
  Allows you to see the true name of your fellow players.

# Planned Features:
- **Roles** - L, Mello
- **Reputation System** - Infamy
- **Death Note QoL** - Kill Trackers
- **Line of Sight** - Requiring a face rather than just a name
- **More Causes of Death** - More than just a heart attack.
